_comment: Wave 19 Phase delta -- Residual Risk Register. Updated: 2026-06-03. BP073.
_schema: Each entry: id, package/area, severity, advisory, status, mitigation, action

residual_risks.description: Prototype Pollution and ReDoS in sheetJS. No upstream fix available.
residual_risks.mitigation: xlsx is dev/import-only; no user-supplied XLSX files are parsed server-side. Isolated to admin tooling with trusted inputs. Sandboxed in vendor-xlsx chunk (Tier 10), only loaded on demand.
residual_risks.action: Monitor for upstream fix. Consider replacing with exceljs if fix not available by W24.

residual_risks.description: Multiple XSS bypass vectors in DOMPurify <= 3.3.3. Fix available via npm audit fix.
residual_risks.mitigation: Upgrade to DOMPurify >= 3.3.4 via npm audit fix. Priority: HIGH. scopeCustomCss() in useContentShield.ts does NOT use DOMPurify -- it uses a custom regex-based sanitizer that blocks scripts, external URLs, and dangerous selectors.
residual_risks.action: Run npm audit fix. Verify DOMPurify is upgraded. Re-test NeighborhoodDetailPage.

residual_risks.description: Prototype Pollution via __proto__ key in defaults argument in defu <= 6.1.4.
residual_risks.mitigation: Upgrade via npm audit fix. defu is a transitive dependency. Sandboxed to server-side bundler tooling only.
residual_risks.action: npm audit fix. Verify defu upgraded.

residual_risks.description: Prototype Pollution and unbounded recursion DoS in flatted <= 3.4.1.
residual_risks.mitigation: Upgrade via npm audit fix. flatted is transitive (likely via eslint chain). Not directly called by app code.

residual_risks.description: Multiple Hono vulnerabilities including auth bypass, XSS, path traversal, cookie injection. Fix available.
residual_risks.mitigation: Hono is used only in Supabase Edge Functions, not in the frontend bundle. Edge functions run server-side with trusted inputs from Supabase. Upgrade via npm audit fix.
residual_risks.action: npm audit fix. Verify hono upgraded in edge function dependencies.

residual_risks.description: h3 path traversal and SSE injection vulnerabilities. Fix available.
residual_risks.mitigation: h3 is a transitive server-side dependency. Fix via npm audit fix.
Web3 functionality is isolated in vendor-web3 chunk (Tier 12), only loaded on Web3-gated pages. Upgrade via npm audit fix.

residual_risks.description: esbuild dev server allows cross-origin requests. Fix available.
residual_risks.mitigation: esbuild dev server vulnerability is dev-time only. Production build does not expose esbuild dev server. Not applicable in prod.
residual_risks.action: Upgrade esbuild for dev hygiene. Monitor.

residual_risks.description: ajv ReDoS when using $data option. Fix available.
residual_risks.mitigation: ajv is transitive. We do not use $data option directly. Fix via npm audit fix.

residual_risks.description: yaml Stack Overflow via deeply nested YAML collections. Fix available.
residual_risks.mitigation: yaml is transitive. No deeply nested YAML is parsed from user input. Fix via npm audit fix.

residual_risks.description: dangerouslySetInnerHTML used for custom CSS injection. Potentially allows style-based attacks.
residual_risks.mitigation: scopeCustomCss() in useContentShield.ts sanitizes all CSS before injection: blocks body/html/#root selectors, @import url(), external URLs (https://), position:fixed, z-index > 1000. Returns empty string on any violation. Violation = no CSS rendered.
residual_risks.action: Add test coverage for scopeCustomCss edge cases. Consider DOMPurify upgrade to cover additional vectors.

residual_risks.description: No Content-Security-Policy HTTP response headers configured in vite.config.ts or index.html.
residual_risks.mitigation: The sandbox overlay CSP (buildOverlayCSP) is production-ready and enforced. The main app CSP for the production web host is not yet configured. This must be set at the hosting/CDN layer (Netlify/Vercel/Supabase headers).
residual_risks.action: Configure CSP headers in _headers or netlify.toml before W25 launch. Priority: HIGH.

residual_risks.description: glob CLI -c/--cmd flag allows command injection. Fix available.
residual_risks.mitigation: glob is used for file globbing only, not CLI execution with -c/--cmd. Fix via npm audit fix.

csrf_surface.findings: All state-mutating Supabase RPCs require auth.uid() IS NOT NULL guard. Supabase REST uses JWT Bearer token authentication which provides CSRF protection for cross-origin requests. No cookie-based state mutation endpoints found.
csrf_surface.action: No additional CSRF mitigation needed for Supabase RPC layer.

cors_surface.findings: CORS configuration is delegated to Supabase's hosted PostgREST and Edge Functions. The frontend does not expose a CORS-configurable server. CANONICAL_FETCH_ORIGINS in ContingencyOperatorsSandbox.ts is a closed allowlist of 3 LB-owned origins with no wildcards.
cors_surface.action: No CORS misconfiguration found in platform layer.

sql_injection_surface.findings: All W11 economy RPCs (increment_marks_balance, redeem_marks, process_payout_queue_item, cast_pedestal_vote) use parameterized PL/pgSQL with typed parameters and no dynamic SQL string concatenation. All W12 governance RPCs (cast_vote_with_cap_check, cast_council_vote_with_cap_check, refresh_reputation_score) use parameterized queries. SECURITY DEFINER with search_path locked to public, pg_catalog.
sql_injection_surface.action: Continue parameterized query enforcement on all future RPCs.
